Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 377 

PRE_ICL_MO_COPAY_3M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Pharmacy Copay for 3-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a 3-month supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using a standard mail order pharmacy during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_MO_COPAY_3M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH:
